blueprintRow.moduleExitOutcome: Learner can greet people politely, introduce themselves at a basic level, ask who/what/where questions, and survive the first minute of a conversation.
blueprintRow.lessonPrimaryOutcome: Learner can ask what something is and where something is.
blueprintRow.lessonSecondaryOutcome: Learner can recycle recent vocabulary while using where question with ที่ไหน in short controlled output.
blueprintRow.grammarFunctionPrimary: what question with อะไร
blueprintRow.grammarFunctionSecondary: where question with ที่ไหน
blueprintRow.newVocabCore: อะไร = what; ที่ไหน = where; อยู่ = be located / live; ที่นี่ = here; ที่นั่น = there; นี่ = this; นั่น = that
blueprintRow.newChunksCore: นี่อะไร = what is this?; คุณอยู่ที่ไหน = where do you live?; ห้องน้ำอยู่ที่ไหน = where is the bathroom?
blueprintRow.reviewVocabRequired: คุณ = you; เขา = he / she; ศูนย์ = zero; หนึ่ง = one; สอง = two; สาม = three
blueprintRow.scriptTarget: Read question words and location words with visual support.
blueprintRow.listeningTarget: Recognize what/where questions in slow service speech.
blueprintRow.speakingTarget: Ask what an object is and where a place is.
blueprintRow.lessonQuizFocus: Question words อะไร and ที่ไหน with location verb อยู่.
blueprintRow.notes: Vocabulary system lesson. Contrast and sort related items for fast retrieval.
blueprintRow.sourceInspiration: Thai With Fah first-contact pragmatics; ThaiPod101 introduction lessons; internal backwards planning.
